site_description: A short history of Thailand's most ubiquitous dish.
home_subtitle: Thai fried rice was never just leftovers. It travelled from Teochew kitchens to royal palaces to the wok of the cart at the corner of your soi. Five short essays on how a humble dish became a country's signature.
blog_subtitle: A five-part story of khao pad — from Teochew migrants and royal kitchens to street vendors and modern reinventions.
cms_sign_up_description: Set up the first super admin for this site.
cms_sign_up_only_once: Sign-up is only available before the first admin is created.
cms_media_help: Upload images, video, audio, or PDFs. Served from R2, metadata in D1.
cms_media_empty: No media yet. Upload your first file above.
cms_media_delete_confirm: Delete this file? The R2 object and metadata will be removed.
cms_cover_media_help: Paste a media ID from the Media library, or leave blank.
cms_categories_help: Categories group articles into sections. Each article belongs to at most one.
cms_categories_empty: No categories yet. Create one to start organising articles.
cms_category_delete_confirm: Delete this category? Articles using it will keep a dangling reference.
cms_tags_help: Tags are free-form labels. An article can have many.
cms_tag_delete_confirm: Delete this tag? It will be removed from every article that uses it.
cms_users_help: People with access to this CMS. Only super admins and admins can change roles or remove users.
cms_users_empty: Only you so far. Invite a teammate to start collaborating.
cms_user_delete_confirm: Remove this user? Their articles stay but the account is deleted permanently.
cms_user_self_delete_blocked: You can't remove your own account.
cms_user_self_role_blocked: You can't change your own role.
cms_user_last_super_admin_blocked: At least one super admin must remain.
cms_invite_help: Share this signup link. The first person to use it claims an account at the chosen role.
cms_invite_unsupported: Invite links are not yet supported on this deployment. Ask the user to sign up at /cms/signup; the first signup becomes the super admin.
cms_settings_help: Site-wide settings. Read by both the public site and the CMS.
cms_settings_site_name_help: Shown in the navbar, page titles, and footer.
cms_settings_default_locale_help: The locale visitors land on at /. Must be one of the supported locales.
cms_settings_cdn_base_url_help: If set, media URLs are rewritten to point at this domain. Leave blank to serve from R2 directly.
cms_no_articles: No articles yet. Create your first one!
cms_article_en_required_help: English content is required. The slug is derived from the English title.
cms_article_th_optional_help: Thai content is optional. Leave blank to publish English-only.
cms_slug_help: Lowercase ASCII letters, digits, hyphens. Auto-derived from the English title.
cms_delete_confirm: Delete this article? This cannot be undone.
cms_editor_preview_empty: Start typing to see a live preview.
